title: intensional equality
manager: Functions compare by intensional equality — same normalized structure means equal — rather than by reference identity, which wouldn't survive serialization or a second implementation. This is what makes "is this the same strategy as before" a meaningful, portable question instead of a pointer comparison that happens to be true only within one process on one host.
cs: intensional (structural) equality over the defunctionalization tag (W6.27); reference-independent; survives serialize/replay and the second implementation.
